title: Heat Shock Transformation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"73idl","text":"Purpose of this protocol is to introduce plasmid DNA into E. coli cells","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw desired E. coli strain on ice for ~10 minutes.
Add 5 uL of ligated DNA or ~10 ng of miniprepped plasmid DNA to 50 uL of E. colicells. Incubate on ice for 20-30 minutes.
After heat shock, let rest on ice for 10 minutes.
Add 250 uL LB Broth to E. coli solution.
After 1 hour, plate bacteria onto LB Agar+antibiotic plates, spreading solution evenly.
creator: Dalhousie Igem
